summary: P0 Features Testing: First-Time Free Viewing + Video Wait-Time Messaging

minor.issue: Rate limit (429) hit during testing - expected behavior, 5 requests/hour limit

details: POST /api/public/quick-generate returns allow_free_view field
allow_free_view is boolean type
Logic: prev_session_count == 0 → allow_free_view = True (new IP)
Logic: prev_session_count > 0 → allow_free_view = False (returning IP)
IP hash check uses SHA256[:16] for privacy
Session ID comparison excludes current session from count
allowFreeView state initialized from API response (line 159)
Part 2 generation: No gate, always allowed (line 248-249)
Part 3 generation: If allowFreeView=true, bypasses hard paywall (line 251-254)
Part 3 generation: If allowFreeView=false, shows hard paywall (line 255-262)
first_time_free_view_used event tracked when Part 3 generated for first-time user
Soft CTA appears after Part 3 for first-time users (line 417)
Condition: allowFreeView && continuations.length >= 2 && !isGeneratingPart
CTA text: 'Upgrade to download, create more, and unlock premium quality'
Has 'Continue exploring for free' option (data-testid='soft-continue-exploring-btn')
Has 'Upgrade Now' button (data-testid='soft-upgrade-btn')
StoryPaywall component shows for returning users at Part 3
Paywall has data-testid='story-paywall-overlay'
Close button has data-testid='paywall-close-btn'
Exit offer shows on close attempt
Toast message at line 940 in StoryVideoStudio.js
Exact text: 'Your story video is being created. This usually takes at least 5 minutes. While it's processing, feel free to explore other features.'
Duration: 10000ms (10 seconds)
WaitingExperience component shows video-wait-info banner (line 283-296)
Condition: stage === 'video_assembly' || stage === 'video_rendering'
Banner has data-testid='video-wait-info'
Exact text: 'Your story video is being created. This usually takes at least 5 minutes. While it's processing, feel free to explore other features.'
estimatedTime prop shows 'at least 5 minutes' for video_assembly stage (line 1214)
Progress message shows '...This usually takes at least 5 minutes.' (line 1163)
Video button (handleVideo) requires login - redirects to /login if no token (line 273-276)
Share button works for all users (navigator.share or clipboard)
Download requires authentication (handled by backend)
/experience page loads demo story in <2s
Story title and Part 1 text render correctly
'Continue Story' CTA visible with pulsing animation
'What happens next?' prompt shows cliffhanger

backend_instant_story_py.allow_free_view_logic: Correct - checks prev_session_count for different sessions from same IP
backend_instant_story_py.mock_mode_returns_true: Line 100 - mock mode always returns allow_free_view: True

frontend_instant_story_experience_jsx.continue_story_logic: Lines 241-258 - Correct bypass for first-time users at Part 3

critical_code_review_comments: All P0 features are correctly implemented
allow_free_view backend logic is IP-based with session exclusion
5-minute wait message is hardcoded consistently across toast, progress card, and estimated time
Soft upgrade CTA appears only for first-time users after Part 3
Hard paywall appears for returning users at Part 3
Download/video buttons are properly gated (require login)
seed_data_creation: None - uses demo stories from DEMO_STORIES array
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features (First-Time Free Viewing + Video Wait-Time Messaging) are fully implemented and verified. Rate limit is 5/hour for /api/public/quick-generate. The allow_free_view check uses IP hash + session_id exclusion. Since testing environment shares one IP, subsequent calls will show allow_free_view=false. To test first-time=true behavior, verify the frontend conditional logic directly.
mocked_apis: None - real LLM generation via Emergent LLM Key
